Supplying, erection, testing  & commissioning of Fire Alarm Panel. The panel shall be microprocessor based analogue addressable type alarm control panel with 10 loops (Max 159detectors and 159 devices in one loop), with 4 line 40 character LCD display, password protected access levels, event historical logging, flash EPROM, 240 volts AC power supply, automatic battery charger, 24 volts sealed maintenance  free lead acid batteries sufficient for    24    hours   normal    working     and   capable  of operating the system for 30 minutes during emergency conditions, etc. as per specification complete with in-built printer port, suitable for integration of  voice evacuation system, audio message generator, suitable amplifiers for all the speakers and fire fighter Telephone command center complete as per specifications.
